prompt: Audit claude.ai — just SEO technical and structured data categories

assertions.text: Report contains only SEO Technical and Structured Data sections — no AEO, GEO, or SEO On-Page category results
Check IDs follow naming convention: TECH-* for SEO Technical, SD-* for Structured Data
Score values appear to come from score.py (category scores out of 100, letter grades matching the grading scale)
Overall score reflects proportional weight redistribution across only 2 categories (not 5)
Priority fix list is ordered by severity (Critical first, then Important, then Nice to Have)
